alkylation reagent: alkylated by adding the alkylation buffer (55 mM iodoacetamide, 100 mM ammonium bicarbonate)
alkylation concentration: alkylated by adding the alkylation buffer (55 mM iodoacetamide, 100 mM ammonium bicarbonate)
cleavage agent: re-hydrated at 4 °C for 40 min with the trypsin solution (6 ng/µL of trypsin sequencing grade from Promega, 25 mM ammonium bicarbonate)
collision energy: MS/MS conditions were: normalized collision energy, 35 V
enrichment method: by AP-MS (Affinity purification mass spectrometry) analysis
fractionation method: gel bands were excised under a clean bench
instrument: coupled to the LTQ Orbitrap Velos (ThermoFisher Scientific, Bremen, Germany)
ionization type: equipped with a Proxeon nanoelectrospray ion source
reduction reagent: reduction buffer (10 mM DTT, 100 mM ammonium bicarbonate)
reduction concentration: reduction buffer (10 mM DTT, 100 mM ammonium bicarbonate)
